hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -q 'git push' && { npm run lint:biome 2>&1 && npx tsc --noEmit --project tsconfig.check.json 2>&1 || { echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Lint or type check failed. Fix errors before pushing."}'; exit 0; }; } || true
hooks.statusMessage: Running lint & type check before push...

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -q 'gh pr create' && { echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"IMPORTANT: Before creating this PR, you MUST run the convention-reviewer agent and principal-architect-reviewer agent on all uncommitted changes. If either finds issues, fix them before creating the PR. Do NOT proceed with gh pr create until both reviews pass."}}'; } || true
hooks.statusMessage: Checking if PR review is needed...
